name: Table of Contents
author: l3ad3r1
description: Editor command that scans your Markdown headings and inserts a nested table of contents at the top.
main:
octo.registerCommand("toc", "Insert Table of Contents", function(t){ var text = String(t); var lines = text.split("
"); var toc = []; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { var m = lines[i].match(/^(#{1,6})\s+(.+)$/); if (m) { var level = m[1].length; var title = m[2].replace(/[*_`~]/g, "").trim(); var indent = new Array((level - 1) * 2 + 1).join(" "); toc.push(indent + "- " + title); } } if (toc.length === 0) { octo.log("No headings found"); return text; } return "## Table of Contents
" + toc.join("
") + "

" + text; });
